ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the component (e.g., checkbox, button) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the component (e.g., input, button, layout) */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date the component was created */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Date the component was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the property belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., state, size) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the property (e.g., Boolean, String) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property is required */,
  "default_value_id" INTEGER /* ID of the default value for the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_default_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("default_value_id") REFERENCES default_values ("default_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the value belongs to */,
  "value" TEXT /* Available value for the property (e.g., true, false, '', 'mini') */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the available value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_values_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "default_values" (
  "default_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each default value */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the default value belongs to */,
  "value" TEXT /* Default value for the property (e.g., 'checked' attribute or true) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the default value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("default_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_default_values_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the configuration belongs to */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the value is for */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the property (e.g., true, false, '', 'mini') */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component version the configuration belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_configurations_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES component_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_configurations_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_configurations_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration the history entry belongs to */,
  "changed_on" TEXT /* Date the configuration was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the property after the change */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the property before the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_history_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES component_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, designer, admin) */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., developer, designer, admin) */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level for the role (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the access entry belongs to */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the access entry is for */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the access entry is for */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., 1.0, 2.0) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the release belongs to */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the version */,
  "released_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who released the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_releases_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES component_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_releases_released_by FOREIGN KEY ("released_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the dependency belongs to */,
  "dependent_component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependent component */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., hard, soft) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_dependencies_dependent_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_dependencies_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
